abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Don't Turn Your Back
abilities.text: Enemy models that activate engaged with this model may not declare the Interact action until the end of their activation.

actions.name: Executioner Claws
actions.effects: If this action receives a raise, the target may either discard a card or drain a (c). If it does neither, it is killed.

triggers.name: Kindle
triggers.text: Target must have a Burning token. Deal 1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Like the Wind
triggers.text: Move this model up to 5", ignoring enemy models.

actions.name: Command Construct
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Construct only. This action may target friendly models. This action cannot target the same model more than once per activation.
actions.effects: Target declares an action, chosen and controlled by this model.

triggers.name: Arcanist Cache
triggers.text: Summon a Steam Arachnid within 1" of the target.

actions.name: The Monster You Made
actions.effects: Remove any number of enemy tokens from this model. This model declares the Charge action, ignoring restrictions, increasing the Skl of the generated action by the number of tokens removed.
